problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: The key to Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? is BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis — specifically BDNF upregulation to — which would help 12,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
